p.strong: Milestone 2: Log Writer with Group Commit (High Performance Path)

ol.li: Write Barrier: next_lsn is advanced before releasing append_lock.
No Partial Writes: The WriteBuffer must flush only complete log records.
Non-Blocking Append: fsync operations occur outside the append_lock critical section.
Strict Ordering: LSNs are monotonically increasing and correspond exactly to physical file offsets.
Group Efficiency: Leader flushes all data up to the maximum requested LSN by any current waiter.
